next_steps: Perform nasopharyngeal tissue biopsy for histopathology, including GMS and PAS stains, IgG4 immunostaining, and flow cytometry
Measure serum ANCA (PR3 and MPO) and IgG4 levels
Perform lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis (cytology, flow cytometry, and infectious workup)
Assess for involvement of other organ systems, including urinalysis and chest CT
Perform targeted deep biopsy of nasopharyngeal mass with histology, immunohistochemistry, and flow cytometry
Measure serum ANCA (PR3 and MPO) and IgG4 levels
Perform whole-body imaging (e.g., PET-CT) to identify potential systemic sites of disease
Evaluate for ocular or cranial nerve impairment with formal ophthalmology consult
Perform lumbar puncture for CSF studies including cytology, flow cytometry, and infectious workup
Coordinate multidisciplinary management including Rheumatology, Otolaryngology, and Neurosurgery
